Includes dry gauze dressings, dressings moistened with saline or other solutions, transparent dressings, hydrogel dressing, and dressings with hydrocolloid or hydroactive particles. 0 = Unchecked, 1 = Checked, -1 = Unknown
129 N1A N1A_MORNING 36a(N1a)Time Awake - Morning CHAR 1 Identifies those periods of a typical morning (over the last seven days) when the patient was awake all or most of the time
